# Sådan investerer Holger Rune og familien

**Feed**: borsen-podcast  
**Published**: 2026-05-02  
**Market Sentiment**: Neutral

⏱️ **Time Horizon Key**: ST = <3 months | MT = 3-12 months | LT = >12 months

---

## Episode Thesis

This is a lifestyle episode where tennis player Holger Rune and his family (Alma and Anneke) discuss how they invest in and renovate real estate across Monaco, France, and Denmark as a family hobby. There is no equity or stock-picking discussion; the only commercial entities named are sponsors and the publishing outlet. The investment theme is purely property ('pleasure investment'), with no directional views on any listed company.

---

## Recommendations

_No signals for universe stocks in this episode._
